personal.adviceTitle: Best Advice That I Ever Received
advices: Instead of wasting time making the right decision, make a decision and make it right
Learn from the past, plan for the future, and live in the present
The world values people who can execute tasks and deliver on time
You don't become the person that things you do sometimes you become the person that things you do daily so have goof habits

experience.title: Senior Co-ordinator
experience.description:
• Leadership & Events: Executed multiple events through cross-functional teamwork.

• Mentorship & Delivery: Guided junior members as a 3rd-year Senior Coordinator, providing learning resources, project suggestions, and managing strict timelines.

• Digital Growth: Started the launch of the R&D Cell's independent Instagram handle, securing approval via a long-term commitment to active content strategy.

• Others: Hosted the Connect 3.0 fresher quiz event and developed domain-specific engineering projects showcased at Techmela.
